creator: trombik1973@gmail.com
text:
a CH552 board does not attach as umodem(4). the board works on Linux (as /dev/ttyACM0).

ugen0.6: <Deqing CH55xduino> at usbus0, cfg=0 md=HOST spd=FULL (12Mbps) pwr=ON (200mA)
